finite_source: G24 generated from H8^3 by Type II neighbor chain 42->18->6->0.
fixed_point_map: x_i <- sqrt((24/w) P_x(i in B)), with multiplicative damping in log coordinates.
kkt_condition: For a positive maximizer under mean-square normalization, product-biased shell inclusion probabilities must satisfy P(i in B) = (w/24) x_i^2.
main_boundary: This is not a global proof. It reduces the residue to proving global uniqueness of the positive KKT fixed point, or providing a Veronese-constrained Krawtchouk/SOS certificate.
main_positive_result: All tested log-positive starts converged to the all-equal KKT fixed point for w=12 and w=16; equal point is locally contracting for the KKT map.
scope: Damped KKT fixed-point basin audit for the remaining Golay shell domination lemma in shells w=12 and w=16.
